text: Computing word, sentence, paragraph or document similarity is essential for a large number of Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks, such as information retrieval, document clustering, word-sense disambiguation, automatic essay scoring, short answer grading, machine translation and text summarization. This survey provides a broad survey of approaches for measuring text similarity. The existing approaches have been classified into three main categories named as String-based, Corpus-based and Knowledge-based similarities, and examples of their combinations are also provided.
